dragons add-on.name: Dragons Add-On

- Hatch dragon eggs 
- Acquire dragon pets and mounts 
- Craft dragon armor and weapons 
- Explore ruins, settlements, and dragon nests

world biomes.name: World Biomes
world biomes.description:
You're stranded in a huge world in the middle of the ocean with nothing but a few starting items and your survival skills.

Become an ultimate survival master!

=> Huge 1000x1000 world
=> 35+ challenging quests
=> Realistic environment
=> 12 unique biomes
=> Realism features
=> Hardcore survival
=> Legendary bosses
=> Extreme challenges
=> OP traders
=> Play with friends

bed wars classic.name: Bed Wars Classic

Welcome to a super intensive, highly engaging, and super fun bed wars game. Compete alone or with friends against challenging hostile monsters or fight your friends in full PVP mode.

+Upgrade resource generators
+Defend your base island and attack your enemies
+Full single player and multiplayer support

+8 HD skins

golem mania add-on.name: Golem Mania Add-On
golem mania add-on.description:
Let’s add custom Golems to ANY WORLD! New possibilities and mechanics to explore.

- A detailed Golem’s Compendium
- Build and Summon!

By Crimson Creative & Pathway Studios
golem mania add-on.creator: Pathway Studios

cinecam add-on.name: Cinecam Add-On

Create cinematic masterpieces with professional camera tools and smooth path animations.
- Path Camera with visual particle paths and smooth cinematic shots

- Licensed by SE7ENDAYS Studio and published by BLOCKLAB Studios.

advanced machines add-on.name: Advanced Machines Add-On

advanced machines add-on.description:
Love machines Add-Ons? 25+ automated machines and pipes in YOUR world!

+ Use Add-Ons in YOUR worlds
+ Compatible with other Add-Ons

craftable bases add-on.name: Craftable Bases Add-On
craftable bases add-on.creator: 5 Frame Studios
craftable bases add-on.description:
Craftable Bases Add-On features more than 25 Craftable Bases to create and explore! Craft new furniture to design your base!

- 30+ Craftable Furniture pieces
- Explore the world or craft items to unlock new bases

adrift.name: Adrift
adrift.description: Adrift is an ocean exploration survival experience. Complete 150+ quests, expand your raft, automate with 15+ machines, defeat 3 custom bosses, build a submersible vehicle and diving equipment to explore the depths, obtain 15+ custom weapons and armor sets, and more!
adrift.creator: Vatonage

dynamic details.name: Dynamic Details
dynamic details.description:
Dynamic Details introduces a brand new level of visual depth to your world. Striking 3D effects, breathtaking atmosphere, cinematic water & so much more!

- Stunning lighting, realistic water & natural colors
- Detailed 3D textures true to the Vanilla style
- Glowing ores & colorful lights
- Block variants for an immersive feel
- Choose from 3 versions: Vanilla, 64x & 128x
dynamic details.creator: Square Dreams

100 days civilization.name: 100 Days Civilization
100 days civilization.description:
Can you survive 100 days in this vast open world with new animals and civilizations. Trade or complete quests for rewards in different cities.
Visit ruins and collect lore books. Gather materials with your friends to build your own base and economy. 

- Boss Fights
- Epic Dungeons
- Custom Mobs and Animals
- Collect Resources and Build up a Civilization
100 days civilization.creator: MobBlocks

timeless adventures.name: Timeless Adventures
timeless adventures.description:
Unleash your creativity in a fully-featured limited world! Explore 30 unique structures in the Music Disc Hunt or play pure survival on a perfect canvas. 
With every biome, every structure, and a special texture pack, your experience will be timeless.
timeless adventures.creator: IBXToyMaps

driving legacy.name: Driving Legacy
driving legacy.description:
In "Driving Legacy", Alternate between morning deliveries to nighttime exploration. Experience the thrill of the road as you navigate bustling streets and serene towns, weaving your own story in this dynamic car adventure.

+ Simulator
+ Cars
+ Mountain terrain
+ Amazing Music
+ Roleplay
driving legacy.creator: DeliSoft Studios

mob mechs.name: Mob Mechs
mob mechs.description:
Feel the power of Mob Mechs! Drive giant robot mobs like the Creeper, Villager and Wither. Break walls, fire weapons and destroy enemy piglin mechs! Get new parts to craft even more robot mobs. Visit the End and take down the Ender Dragon! You can even battle your friends!

+ 12 controllable mechs with unique attacks
+ HD mech based skins
+ Custom music, SFX and VO
mob mechs.creator: Logdotzip

jdm select.name: JDM Select
jdm select.description:
Roleplay with friends in this game where you create your own story. Expand, upgrade, and win races around the island. Unlock new cars along the way by collecting loot boxes and selling car parts to mechanics to earn cash.

-(2) distinct islands
- A wide variety of 36 vehicles to race in
- Role-playing map with lots of interactable NPCs.
jdm select.creator: DeliSoft Studios

better on bedrock v1.2.1.name: Better on Bedrock v1.2.1
better on bedrock v1.2.1.description:
Explore a new world of Minecraft with Better on Bedrock, a new Dynamic World! There is tons to explore!

• Custom trees, biomes and structure generation
• 100+ New blocks and items
• 20+ New Mobs
• 40+ New Foods & Quests
• 7 New Bosses
• Enjoy custom music and ambience

This item uses random start areas for any new world. Endless possibilities!
better on bedrock v1.2.1.creator: FoxyStar Studios

fast imports.name: Fast Imports
fast imports.description:
Hit the gas pedal and zoom through the streets in the country of Hapan! Explore 4 different cities. Unlock new cars along the way by unlocking loot boxes and selling car parts to mechanics to earn cash and trade.

- 4 cities with 5 small towns to race in
- Car dealerships, banks, mechanics and gas stations found in every city
- 36 different cars to collect and customize
fast imports.creator: Netherpixel

toy story mash-up.name: Toy Story Mash-up
toy story mash-up.description: Open up the toy box! Woody, Buzz, Bo Peep and many of your favorite toys come to life in this oversized Mash-up based on all the Toy Story movies! To infinity and beyond!
toy story mash-up.creator: Minecraft

ender storm.name: ENDER STORM
ender storm.description:
Battle the Ender Storm boss! Play the ultimate and most epic boss pack ever added to your world.

+ Ender Storm boss pack
+ 14 Boss stage evolutions!
+ Tractor beams, eye skulls, tentacle attacks & more!
+ Story mode playthrough
+ Ender minion mobs
+ 5 OP weapons
+ Epic boss fight
+ Advanced mob AI
+ Survival-friendly
+ By XP GAMES
ender storm.creator: Panascais

banana teens hd.name: Banana Teens HD
banana teens hd.description: Stand out in these stylish banana themed outfits! Fruity, fun, and super sharp in HD.
banana teens hd.creator: Wonder

rune spells.name: Rune Spells
rune spells.description:
Ancient runes awaken forgotten power. Rune Spells enhances your survival with mystical abilities focused on battle, defense, and utility, letting you shape your strategy and unleash arcane energy your way!

- 12 Unique Rune Spells
- Runes that empower your journey.
- Electrifying Effects
rune spells.creator: Gearblocks

gravestones.name: Gravestones
gravestones.creator: Box Build
gravestones.description: Recover your items effortlessly after death with unique graves that keep your loot safe. Upgrade your graves for benefits like experience recovery, a distant beacon, and respawn advantages. Craft the Great Totem to manage features and teleport to your last death location. Customize your graves and keep your adventure going strong!

chess battle.name: Chess Battle
chess battle.description:
The first ever Minecraft chess in the entire marketplace comes to life in Chess Battle. Play, learn and have fun with the most advanced game mechanics. Improve your skills challenging your friends on the checkered field!

- 3 sets recreated with unique locations.
- A complete guide book to learn basic movements.
chess battle.creator: Diveblocks

traders++ add-on.name: Traders++ Add-On
traders++ add-on.creator: Dodo Studios
traders++ add-on.description:
- 20 new wandering traders spawn in your world!
- They trade new weapons with abilities, custom armor, furniture, vehicles and much more!
- Use this add-on in your own survival world!

the storage expansion.name: The Storage Expansion
the storage expansion.creator: Cleverlike
the storage expansion.description:
The Ultimate Add-On for Your Storage Needs
• Craft duplicate items into one block to free up space
• Perfect for massive projects and farms where inventory space is limited
• Works in Survival & Creative
• Invincible ChestBot pet to store your items
• Create up to 4 layers of storage, turning 4000+ blocks into one
• Uncraft storage blocks anywhere to recover your items

over mob add-on.name: Over Mob Add-On
over mob add-on.creator: Overtales Studio
over mob add-on.description:
Over Mob Add-On brings thrilling new bosses and mobs, along with powerful gear. Explore, discover, and engage with these creatures as you venture into a new world!
+ 80+ new mobs (Prime, Elite, Trigger Event) with unique abilities and variants

+ 200 new items and 40 equipment pieces, including weapons, armor, potions, and consumables

prizma visuals 2.1.creator: Starfish Studios

- 3D Blocks

[!] Prizma Visuals is not a shader.

bedwars: origins.name: BedWars: Origins
bedwars: origins.creator: Lifeboat
bedwars: origins.description:
*CLANK* Jump on the bed, and into your own Lifeboat style BedWars with up to 15 of your friends and family! Fight for your life in the jungle or the arctic map in this feature-packed PvP game. Float high with random gravity, play at night, and go hard in OP Mode.
- 5 NEW custom modes
- 2 unique maps
- Play solos or duos
- Parkour section

No sleep 'til the beds are broken!

another furniture add-on.name: Another Furniture Add-On

another furniture add-on.description:
This Add-On offers 20+ CRAFTABLE VANILLA+ FURNITURE and decorations that can be
added to enhance YOUR OWN HOME.

- Craftable in SURVIVAL
- New TOOLS and UTILITIES
- Upgrade your HOME

[!] USABLE IN ANY WORLD!
Official Bedrock Edition of the Another Furniture Mod Java Mod

anime jutsu add-on.name: ANIME JUTSU Add-On

Unleash your inner JUJUTSU with our ANIME JUTSU Add-On! EVERYTHING inspired from your FAVORITE ANIME shows!
+ 50+ Anime contents inside!
+ Never-seen-before attack animations!
+ Vanilla VFX & challenging boss-fights!
+ Pets, mobs, and mounts to summon!

WATCH THE TRAILER!

better structures 2.0 add-on.name: Better Structures 2.0 Add-On

player skills pro add-on.name: Player Skills Pro Add-On

+63 different skill upgrades!
+Combat, magic & utility skills!
+Epic powers & magical abilities!

rlcraft bedrock edition 1.2.name: RLCraft Bedrock Edition 1.2
rlcraft bedrock edition 1.2.creator: Honeyfrost
rlcraft bedrock edition 1.2.description:

+ Explore new world generation with structures & dungeons 
+ Progress on skills & wield powerful new gear 
+ Custom player & weapon animations 
+ Elemental dragons + Based on the original RLCraft Modpack by Shivaxi

bedwars.name: Bedwars

actions & stuff 1.11.name: Actions & Stuff 1.11

survival essentials [dx].name: SURVIVAL ESSENTIALS [DX]

survival essentials [dx].description:
Experience worlds like never before with SURVIVAL ESSENTIALS! Discover countless new blocks, mobs, and epic adventures in this ultimate expansion.

villagers++ add-on 2.0.name: VILLAGERS++ Add-On 2.0

Slice through mobs with a giant sword!
Mine through mountains!
Chop down forests!
Grow plants in seconds!
Travel with great speed!
Launch TNT at your enemies!

angry birds.name: Angry Birds
angry birds.creator: Oreville Studios
angry birds.description: The Pigs are back to their old tricks, and it's up to you to stop them! Playing as Red, Chuck, Bomb, and other members of The Flock, your mission is to rescue your friends, save the eggs, and stop the pesky Pigs' grand plans. With each rescued bird, you'll unlock a new playable character with unique skills to help you pop more Pigs and topple more towers!

minions+.name: Minions+
minions+.creator: Hourglass Studios
minions+.description:
Unleash the power of Minions! Summon 36 unique helpers to assist you in your survival world. From farming and mining to chopping trees and battling mobs, each helper is expertly designed for a specific task.

kawaii neko core.name: Kawaii Neko Core

block pack add-on.creator: Block Factory
block pack add-on.description:
BlockPack Add-on adds +1000 CRAFTABLE & 50 unique FUNCTIONAL new blocks

+ Perfect for Builder

afreshed pets add-on.name: Afreshed Pets Add-On
afreshed pets add-on.creator: CreatorLabs
afreshed pets add-on.description:
Discover the ultimate pet experience with dogs, cats and more, offering over 140 variants, adorable animations, level progression and fun customization.

+ 140+ pet variants
+ Dogs, cats & small pets
+ Level up abilities
+ Fun hats & cosmetics
+ Track, teleport & revive
+ Toys, fetching & whistle commands

soul craft add-on.name: Soul Craft Add-On
soul craft add-on.creator: Snail Studios
soul craft add-on.description:
Embark on a journey through mysterious structures, battle powerful new foes, and harness the souls of the fallen to summon their strength.

- 30+ New mobs!
- 11 New armor sets!
- 40+ Huge weapons!
- New structures!
- Custom trees!

cute dogs add-on.name: Cute Dogs Add-On
cute dogs add-on.creator: Octovon
cute dogs add-on.description:
Cute Dogs is a lightweight Add-On that introduces 15 tamable dog breeds that spawn in your pre-existing world's biomes! Bond with your new furry friends, teach them new tricks, and craft a variety of toys to play with them!

+ 15 new tamable dog breeds!
+ Teach your dog new tricks!
+ Interactable dog toys!

village cities add-on.name: Village Cities Add-On
village cities add-on.creator: Float Studios
village cities add-on.description:
Discover huge Village Cities across the overworld. Purchase one and grow it into a thriving metropolis.

- Own entire cities
- Construct skyscrapers, shops and factories
- Trade with 19 new villagers
- Earn bank interest
- Restore derelict buildings and upgrade your city
- Defend against zombie invasions
- Travel between cities by train

Build your Village City empire.

advanced movement 2.0.name: Advanced Movement 2.0
advanced movement 2.0.creator: Ninja Squirrel Gaming
advanced movement 2.0.description:
Elevate your game play with Advanced Movement! Use these epic new skills, all featuring stunning custom animations:
- Double Jump, Dash, Slide and Dodge Roll
- Wall Running, Wall Climbing, Ledge Grab
- Water Running

Powerful Gadgets for even more fun:
- Zip lines, Grappling Hooks, Rockets, Cannons and Spring powered Jump Pads!

By Ninja Squirrel Gaming

farms + foods.name: Farms + Foods
farms + foods.creator: Misfits
farms + foods.description:
FARMS + FOODS! Add many new crops, trees, animals and over 500 new foods recipies!

- 500+ New Food recipies
- Cute Farming Pets and Animals
- New Crafting Stations and Tools
- Add Custom structures and villages
- Add Crops and Trees inside vanilla biomes

travelcraft add-on.name: Travelcraft Add-On
travelcraft add-on.creator: Cubical
travelcraft add-on.description:
Is your happy ghast too slow, or are you missing STORAGE? The Travelcraft Add-On fixes it all!

- UPGRADE the strider, camel, and HAPPY GHAST with awesome abilities!
- 10 UNIQUE upgrades like extra STORAGE, health, TURBO, and more!
- PLATFORM UPGRADE! Bring chests, mobs, or move your ENTIRE BASE wherever you go!

Add this Add-On to your own world!

by Cubical

block pets.name: Block Pets
block pets.creator: Wonder
block pets.description:
Pets as blocks! Find and tame your own block pets.

+ Custom emotions
+ Interactive furniture and toys
+ Feed and care for these super cute pets

This item uses random start areas for any new world. Endless possibilities!

escape room-haunted graveyard.name: Escape Room-Haunted Graveyard
escape room-haunted graveyard.creator: RareLoot
escape room-haunted graveyard.description:
A night like no other! Escape the graveyard as a vampire before daybreak or you'll be trapped there forever!

Includes:
- 1 Escape Room
- 11 exciting and diverse riddles
- 2 vampire skins

easy redstone add-on 1.1.name: Easy Redstone Add-On 1.1
easy redstone add-on 1.1.description:
Are you struggling to build a Redstone contraption? This Add-On helps you build Redstone contraptions easily in just a few steps.
+ 67 Redstone contraptions in small, medium, and large sizes
+ The Drafting Table is your all-in-one tool to build, customize, and manage structures
+ Includes automatic farms, iron farms, XP farms, storage systems, super smelters, and more!
easy redstone add-on 1.1.creator: Overtales Studio

magic add-on.name: Magic Add-On
magic add-on.creator: Misfits
magic add-on.description:
MAGIC Add-On! Install this Add-on to become a real mage and cast powerful spells!

- Includes over 60 Different Magic Spells & Items
- Works on any world
- Multiplayer and Single Player Compatible

herschel backpack trials add-on.name: Herschel Backpack Trials Add-On
herschel backpack trials add-on.creator: Minecraft
herschel backpack trials add-on.description:
Expand your inventory and broaden your horizons with the
Herschel Backpack Trials add-on! Equip and upgrade your own
in-game Herschel backpack by completing a series of
challenges. Make room for more resources, more gear, and
more adventures! Free at Minecraft Marketplace.

naturalist add-on 26.1.name: Naturalist Add-On 26.1
naturalist add-on 26.1.creator: Starfish Studios
naturalist add-on 26.1.description:
The Naturalist Animals Add-On works in ANY WORLD! Find NEW ANIMALS in forests, deserts, oceans, and more in this UPGRADED survival experience.

NOW WITH 200+ ANIMALS and BABIES
Naturally spawning in every BIOME
TAME, RIDE, and INTERACT with them
Single or Multiplayer

[!] USABLE IN ANY WORLD!
Official Bedrock Edition of the Naturalist Java Mod

money add-on.name: Money Add-On
money add-on.creator: Dig Down Studios
money add-on.description:
This Add-On introduces currency into your world, granting you the ability to trade, establish shops, and showcase your wealth. Whether you're dealing in rubies, coins, or stacks of bills, this Add-On ensures an immersive experience in a world of riches.
-Custom traders
-ATM deposit and withdraw system
-Custom gem blocks, gemstones, and power stones
-Usable in any world!

camping add-on.name: Camping Add-On
camping add-on.creator: Dig Down Studios
camping add-on.description:
Discover the wild with the Camping Addon! Encounter raccoons, bears, and other wildlife while riding your ATV. Light your path with a lantern, toast marshmallows by the bonfire, or cook on a super-fast portable stove. Chop trees with a chainsaw, climb with a grappling hook, spot wildlife with binoculars, and so much more! Adventure awaits!
-Usable in any world!

skins of the dark.name: SKINS OF THE DARK
skins of the dark.creator: ChewMingo
skins of the dark.description:

tinkers' construct lite.creator: FTB
tinkers' construct lite.description:
Experience Tinkers' Construct on Bedrock!
This Lite version lets you craft and customize your tools in the classic Tinkers' Construct style.

+ Over 250 unique weapons and tools.
+ New crafting benches and tables.
+ Smelting and forging.
+ Lots of new blocks and items.
+ Craftable Armour sets.

summer bobicraft.name: Summer Bobicraft
summer bobicraft.creator: Chillcraft
summer bobicraft.description:
Join the Bobicraft and Comandiu community in Minecraft with these summer looks! Dress up as a surfer, shark or lifeguard!

Includes a free exclusive look!
Created with vibrant details for summer.

spellbook.name: Spellbook
spellbook.creator: Monster Egg Studios
spellbook.description: Step into a realm of magic and mastery with our Spellbook Addon, featuring ten diverse spellbooks, each brimming with five unique spells for a total of 50 magical abilities. Whether you’re a fire mage incinerating foes, a necromancer commanding the undead, or a druid embracing the natural world. Embrace the arcane and transform your gameplay like never before!

adventurecraft 1.2 add-on.name: AdventureCraft 1.2 Add-On
adventurecraft 1.2 add-on.creator: Octovon
adventurecraft 1.2 add-on.description:
AdventureCraft upgrades your world with new mobs, structures, items, blocks, spells and much more!

- New mobs, bosses and NPCs.
- New ores, items, tools, weapons and armor.
- Spells and magical items.
- Custom structures, dungeons and villages.

backrooms add-on.name: BACKROOMS Add-On
backrooms add-on.creator: XP GAMES
backrooms add-on.description:
Noclip out of your world… into something that shouldn’t load.
A procedurally generated Lobby with sub-biomes, lost loot, and intelligent entities that react to your behavior. Escape, or be hunted by REDACTED.
- Distinct biomes with unique threats
- AI entity behaviors
- Death Level parkour escape
- Visor reveals hidden loot and entities
- First Backrooms generation Add-On

mob parenting: illager family.name: Mob Parenting: Illager Family
mob parenting: illager family.creator: Pathway Studios
mob parenting: illager family.description:
Every Illager starts somewhere, and now's your chance to raise one of your own! Raise your Illager baby through three stages of childhood and prove yourself as a master parent.

- Care for your children & keep your household in order!
- Raise a family together in multiplayer!
- Adorable custom models and animations
- Includes 4 skins.

dwellers 2.1 add-on.name: DWELLERS 2.1 Add-On
dwellers 2.1 add-on.creator: Panascais
dwellers 2.1 add-on.description:
Face these terrifying DWELLERS, watch out for jump scares and prepare to fail. Horror at its finest!

DWELLERS:
+ The Knocker (Official)
+ The Man From The Fog (Official)
+ Krampus
+ Shadow Dweller
+ Goatman
+ Cavern Dweller
+ Unseen Death
+ The All-Seeing One

AND MORE:
+ Blood Moon

+ Blocks & Items

UPDATED! Catch the strongest mobs with your CAPTURE ORB and EVOLVE them into the coolest evolutions! Travel around with your STRONGEST mobs in a MOB ORB!

+ Mob & Item Device!

morph + hide and seek.name: MORPH + Hide and Seek
morph + hide and seek.creator: Ninja Squirrel Gaming
morph + hide and seek.description:
Transform into monsters, animals or blocks with this survival friendly Add-On! Capture mobs with the Soul Trapper and morph into them! 

Want to play a fun game with friends? The Hide and Seek mini-game mode lets you access the Morph Menu and morph into select mobs and blocks immediately! 

- Includes 22 mobs and 62 blocks
- Multiplayer friendly
- By Ninja Squirrel Gaming

rpg skills.name: RPG Skills
rpg skills.creator: Podcrash
rpg skills.description:
Enhance your world with new RPG skills. Level up by playing in your world and doing everyday tasks like farming, mining, exploring, and more! With your levels, you can unlock brand-new abilities that enhance your vanilla experience and make your world more fun and your adventure superb!

+ 10 new classes
+ 36 unique abilities
+ Add-on by Podcrash

decocraft.name: Decocraft
decocraft.creator: Razzleberries
decocraft.description:
Decocraft has come to Bedrock! Enhance your creativity and personalize your worlds with all kinds of home deco! Elevate your interiors with modern, functional, and animated furniture with this one-of-a-kind addon. 

Over 1500 placeable decorations.
And more to come!

morph into anything 2.0 add-on.name: Morph Into Anything 2.0 Add-On
morph into anything 2.0 add-on.creator: Square Dreams
morph into anything 2.0 add-on.description:
MORPH into ANY MOB or BLOCK! Want to be a fire-breathing Dragon? Or why not a grass block to hide from your friends? You can be anything with this Add-On!

+ Baby Versions
+ All Slab and Stairs

+ Easy to use Morph Tools

By Square Dreams

potions expansion.name: Potions Expansion
potions expansion.creator: Galaxite
potions expansion.description: Have you ever wanted to make more potions or potions to make you levitate from the ground? What about making a potion and turning it into a cute little pet? Now you can do all these things and more! You can even craft potions to pour onto the end of your sword to help you fight off those pesky mobs. The possibilities are endless in this fun new potions expansion.

wings++.name: Wings++
wings++.creator: Floruit
wings++.description:
Challenge the creepers, and take on the most dangerous mobs in the world of Minecraft with the most incredible wings in the universe.

+ 10 CUSTOM WINGS!
+ ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES!
+ BEAUTIFUL AND COLORFUL!

x-ray.name: X-RAY

x-ray.description:
Get ready for the X-RAY Magic Miner! It's like having a secret superhero ability to look through solid stuff like rocks, dirt, and even super-duper deepslate! Become a real-life explorer and make your Minecraft journey super cool and easy!

+ Find ores super easily!

chaos cubed: cursed cube add-on.name: Chaos Cubed: Cursed Cube Add-On

aether moa add-on.creator: Spark Universe
aether moa add-on.description: Moas have escaped the Aether! Find them in your world and become friends for life. Mount up, cover ground quickly, skip over ravines, and soar through the skies. Aether Moas come in three distinct colors - blue, white, and black - and there's even babies!

overhauled villages add-on 1.0.creator: Solid Blocks

vertical slabs add-on.description:

+ Slab placement parity
+ Block property parity

aquatic teens 3.description:

levels matter - stats + skills add-on 1..description:

actions & stuff 1.11_61c7a786.name: Actions & Stuff 1.11

TRAIN YOUR OWN DRAGON!

how to train your dragon.name: How to Train Your Dragon
how to train your dragon.creator: Gamemode One
how to train your dragon.description:
This is Berk, home of Vikings and dragons! Join Toothless, Hiccup, and the rest of the dragons and riders on heroic adventures in Minecraft. Compete in racing, map the world, and release captive dragons from invading trappers! Tame, collect, and train dragons from the vast reaches of the Barbaric Archipelago to become an expert dragon rider.

how to train your dragon add-on.description:
